title: Complex Query using Multiple Operations
description: Find names of students enrolled in all courses using Division
explanation: Division operation is used for 'for all' queries. First get all course IDs, then find students whose IDs divided by all course IDs produce a result.

title: Theta Join Implementation
description: Implement natural join using selection and cartesian product
explanation: Join is fundamentally a selection on cartesian product. Natural join additionally removes the duplicate common attribute column.

title: Self-Join using Rename
description: Find employees who earn more than their managers
explanation: Rename operation is essential for self-joins where the same relation is used multiple times. It creates distinct aliases to avoid ambiguity.

title: Outer Join Implementation
description: Implement Left Outer Join using basic operations
explanation: Outer join can be implemented using basic operations: inner join + union of unmatched tuples padded with NULLs.
